title: SaaS Virtualbox — saaspipeshare Wasabi bucket
description:
Each SaaS customer gets an isolated virtualbox inside the saaspipeshare bucket (us-east-2): Tenants/{company-slug}/ with pipeshare/, pipesync/, auth/, and portal file folders. Tenant subdomains (e.g. Techpipe.pipeshare.net) load branded login shells; per-tenant auth snapshots live in Wasabi under system-state.

Who is affected: pipeshare.net SaaS customers (Techpipe first). Private OVH PipeShare server unchanged unless HP_DEPLOYMENT_MODE=saas is enabled there.
changeLog: Dedicated SAAS_WASABI_BUCKET (saaspipeshare) with Tenants/ folder layout.
Tenant provisioning seeds Wasabi skeleton + auth snapshot on subscribe/setup.
GET /saas/tenant/public-by-host for subdomain branding on login pages.
Tenant URLs: PipeShare at /client-portal/, PipeSync at /pipesync.html on {Name}.pipeshare.net (not pipesync.net).
